23.gl: properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe
23.kj: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set.

23.gl: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
23.kj: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

23.gl: a word; collectively, a discourse; figuratively, a topic
23.kj: [phrase] answer, by-word, matter, any thing (what) to say, to speak(-ing), speak, talking, word.
23.dv: from H4448 (מָלַל) (plural masculine as if from מִלֶּה;

23.gl: to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe)

24.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
24.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

24.gl: properly, a (peremptory) terminus, i.e. (by implication) duration, in the sense of advance or perpetuity (substantially as a noun, either with or without a preposition)
24.kj: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, [phrase] world without end.

24.gl: to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material); by implication, to hew, split, square, quarry, engrave
24.kj: cut, dig, divide, grave, hew (out, -er), made, mason.

24.gl: iron (as cutting); by extension, an iron implement
24.dv: perhaps from the root of H1269 (בִּרְזוֹת);
from H5860 (עִיט) (contracted) in the sense of swooping, i.e. side-long stroke;
or עֹפֶרֶת; feminine participle active of H6080 (עָפַר);

25.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
25.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

25.gl: to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.)
25.kj: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.
25.dv: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.

25.gl: hinder; generally, late or last; specifically (as facing the east) western
25.kj: after (-ward), to come, following, hind(-er, -ermost, -most), last, latter, rereward, ut(ter) most.

25.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
25.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.

26.gl: properly, the hind part; generally used as an adverb or conjunction, after (in various senses)
26.kj: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase]

26.gl: to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode); by implication (of attack) to knock together, i.e. surround or circulate
26.kj: compass (about, -ing), cut down, destroy, go round (about), inclose, round.

26.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
26.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.
hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

26.dv: rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);

27.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
27.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

27.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

27.gl: to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery
27.kj: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman).

27.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of
a kidney (as an essential organ); figuratively, the mind (as the interior self)
27.dv: feminine of H3627 (כְּלִי) (only in the plural);

28.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
28.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

28.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
28.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

28.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
28.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
28.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

28.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
28.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).

29.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
29.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
29.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

29.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
29.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

29.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
29.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

29.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
29.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

29.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
29.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

29.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
29.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.
